sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with Q1.15 twiddle multiplication.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM for N=16 cosine and positive sine values.
sub_modules.fft16_index_gen: Combinational stage and butterfly counter decoder that generates DIT memory pair indices and twiddle index.
sub_modules.fft16_bit_reverse: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal mapper used when loading DIT input samples.
